working_on.task: Cut 1.15.1 as a bounded maintenance release and align stable-release surfaces plus skill provenance footers

recent_changes: Every `forge-core` child skill now closes with `Used skill: <skill-name>.` instead of deployment wording.
Multi-skill footer blocks now require one unique `Used skill:` line per used skill instead of repeating duplicate lines.
Stable release surfaces and continuity artifacts now align on `1.15.1` as the current maintenance release.
decisions_made: Keep this cut on the `1.15.x` maintenance line as `1.15.1` because the release is bounded maintenance, not a new roadmap branch.
Skill provenance footers must use neutral wording and emit one unique line per used skill in the final footer block.
